ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the state in square miles */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median household income in the state */,
  "governor" TEXT /* Name of the current governor */,
  "state_bird" TEXT /* State bird */,
  "state_flower" TEXT /* State flower */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violent_crime" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "violent_crime_rate" REAL /* Rate of violent crime */,
  "year_recorded" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to collect the data */,
  "number_of_incidents" INTEGER /* Total number of violent crimes reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id", "year_recorded")
)

CREATE TABLE "murder_rates" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "murder_rate" REAL /* Rate of murder */,
  "year_recorded" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to collect the data */,
  "number_of_incidents" INTEGER /* Total number of murders reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id", "year_recorded")
)

CREATE TABLE "high_school_graduation" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* High school graduation rate */,
  "year_recorded" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to collect the data */,
  "number_of_graduates" INTEGER /* Total number of high school graduates */,
  "number_of_students" INTEGER /* Total number of high school students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id", "year_recorded")
)

CREATE TABLE "poverty_rates" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate */,
  "year_recorded" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to collect the data */,
  "number_of_people_in_poverty" INTEGER /* Total number of people living in poverty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id", "year_recorded")
)

CREATE TABLE "single_parent_households" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "single_parent_rate" REAL /* Percentage of single-parent households */,
  "year_recorded" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to collect the data */,
  "number_of_single_parent_households" INTEGER /* Total number of single-parent households */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id", "year_recorded")
)

CREATE TABLE "racial_demographics" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "white_population" REAL /* Percentage of white population */,
  "black_population" REAL /* Percentage of black population */,
  "asian_population" REAL /* Percentage of Asian population */,
  "hispanic_population" REAL /* Percentage of Hispanic population */,
  "native_american_population" REAL /* Percentage of Native American population */,
  "other_population" REAL /* Percentage of population from other racial backgrounds */,
  "year_recorded" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to collect the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id", "year_recorded")
)

CREATE TABLE "urbanization_levels" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "urbanization_rate" REAL /* Urbanization rate */,
  "year_recorded" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to collect the data */,
  "urban_population" INTEGER /* Total urban population */,
  "rural_population" INTEGER /* Total rural population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id", "year_recorded")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the report */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "viz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, map) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the visualization */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the predictive model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the prediction */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was created */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of prediction (e.g., linear regression, decision tree) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the prediction (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the prediction */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "date_imported" TEXT /* Date the data was imported */,
  "records_imported" INTEGER /* Number of records imported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  "import_type" TEXT /* Type of data imported (e.g., CSV, API) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data imported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination of the data */,
  "date_exported" TEXT /* Date the data was exported */,
  "records_exported" INTEGER /* Number of records exported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the export (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  "export_type" TEXT /* Type of data exported (e.g., CSV, API) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data exported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_time_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data updated */,
  "new_value" REAL /* New value for the data */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time the update was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the update (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the update (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
